channel.title: Llm-Grounding on ❯ DineshKumar's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Llm-Grounding on ❯ DineshKumar's Blog

item.title: RAG vs GraphRAG vs ADK/A2A/MCP: Architecture Choices for Agentic Systems
item.description:
Your LLM is a brilliant liar and your users can tell

You deployed RAG. Documents went into Pinecone. Queries hit the vector store, retrieved relevant chunks, fed them to the model. It worked beautifully for the first month.
